name: iwara-tv-local-player
description: Local Iwara.tv browser and MPV launcher.
author: Demogest

scripts.check:release: npm run typecheck && npm test && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.release:win: npm run check:release && npm run build:tauri -- --bundles nsis && npm run release:portable:win
scripts.release:win:fast: npm run build:tauri -- --bundles nsis && npm run release:portable:win
scripts.icons:build: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && tauri icon build/icons/icon.png --output build/icons
scripts.dist:win: npm run mpv:update && npm run icons:build && npm run release:win
scripts.pack:win: npm run mpv:update && npm run icons:build && tauri build --no-bundle
